message:
fix(speculation,tui): correct None-timestamp segment handling and surface run detail load errors

speculation: fix merge_segments to treat None timestamps as unknown rather
than coercing them to 0.0 — segments without timing info now sort after
timestamped segments and are not deduplicated against each other. Use
last_mut() instead of index-then-replace for dominated segment updates.

tui: replace unwrap_or(None) on load_run_details with proper match that
surfaces parse errors in the status line instead of silently swallowing
them. Add test verifying corrupt run details produce a visible error
message rather than silent failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
